title: OpenClaw
tagline: Open-source AI agent framework with provider-pluggable inference.
description: Open-source agent framework that lets you swap inference providers via the OpenAI-compatible API. Designed to run on Nebius Token Factory by default. Most-starred Nebius community project.

title: AgentScope Evals
tagline: Live evaluation harness for production agents.
description: Eval-as-you-go: run regression tests on your live agent traffic, replay failed conversations, A/B prompts. Powered by Nebius for the eval LLM.

title: k8s-soperator-deploy
description: Helm chart + Terraform module to bring up Soperator on a Nebius-managed K8s cluster in <5 minutes. Includes node-pool sizing recipes for Slurm + GPU workloads.

title: Fine-tune 101 Notebooks
tagline: Beginner-friendly fine-tuning notebooks for Llama, Qwen, GLM.
description: Step-by-step Jupyter notebooks for fine-tuning the popular open-source models on Nebius. Tested on H100 single-node up through 8x H100 multi-node.

title: Mem0 ↔ Nebius adapter
tagline: Drop-in Mem0 backend for agents running on Nebius Token Factory.
description: Adapter layer that wires Mem0 conversational memory into agents using Nebius Token Factory for inference. Works with OpenAI Agents SDK, LangChain, and OpenClaw out of the box.

title: Serverless TF proxy
tagline: Lightweight Token Factory proxy with caching and rate-limiting.
description: A serverless OpenAI-compatible proxy in front of Nebius Token Factory. Adds prompt caching, per-key rate limits, and per-user accounting. Drop in via env var.

title: Agent Observability
tagline: OpenTelemetry-based agent tracing for Token Factory.
description: Trace every LLM call, tool call, and decision your agent makes. OTLP exporter, Grafana dashboards, and a hosted demo. Integrates with Nebius logs.

title: GPU Eval Harness
tagline: Reproducible GPU benchmarks across providers including Nebius.
description: Open benchmarks comparing inference and training throughput across GPU clouds. Reproducible runs, transparent methodology, weekly updated leaderboard.
